login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: New here? Signing in creates your account automatically.
login.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try email instead.
login.emailNote: No password needed. We'll email you a one-click sign-in link.
login.linkSentTo: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click it to continue. The link expires in 1 hour.
login.authFailed: Sign-in failed. Please try again or use email instead.
login.githubFailed: GitHub sign-in failed. Please try email instead.
login.heroDescription: Upload documents and get AI-powered analysis. Flashcards, quizzes, mind maps, reports, and cited chat. All grounded in your data.
login.feature1Desc: Every answer is grounded in your document data, not the internet
login.feature2Desc: Reports, quizzes, mind maps, and slide decks from your documents
login.poweredBy: Powered by Gemini, RAG Pipelines, and pgvector
login.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
login.signUpSuccess: Check your email to confirm your account.
login.passwordRequirements: Min 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol

chat.allAnswers: All answers are grounded in your uploaded documents.
chat.sendHint: Enter to send. Shift+Enter for new line. Sources cited below each reply.
chat.rateLimitError: Rate limit reached. You can send up to 10 messages per minute.
chat.genericError: Couldn't complete the request. Try again in a moment.
chat.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT.
chat.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
chat.messageTooLong: Message is too long. Keep it under 2,000 characters.
chat.starter2: What are the main topics covered?
chat.starter3: What conclusions does the document reach?
chat.starter4: What data or evidence is presented?
chat.uploadToStartDesc: Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT files to start analyzing.

sources.title: Sources
sources.dropOrClick: Drop file or click to add data
sources.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT.
sources.duplicateFile: This file has already been loaded
sources.fileLimitReached: Maximum 5 files per notebook. Delete a file to add more.
sources.uploadInProgress: Upload in progress from another panel...
sources.deleteFailed: Failed to delete file. Try again.

studio.title: Studio
studio.description: Generate analysis and study materials from your documents.
studio.flashcardsDesc: Key facts and concepts at a glance
studio.quizDesc: Test your knowledge of the material
studio.datatableDesc: Key data points, metrics, and facts
studio.generatingNote: This may take 10-30 seconds for large documents.
studio.disclaimer: Generated content is AI-produced and may not be perfectly accurate. Always verify against original source documents.
studio.noNotes: No notes yet. Create one to start writing.
studio.deleteNoteConfirm: This will permanently delete this note. This action cannot be undone.
studio.oneAtATime: One generation at a time. Please wait for the current one to finish.
studio.question: Question

upload.pdfOnly: PDF, DOCX, or TXT. Max {size} MB. Text-based files only.
upload.processingRedirect: Processing document. You'll be redirected automatically.
upload.largeDocNote: This may take up to 60 seconds for large documents.
upload.timeoutError: Processing timed out. The notebook may still finish. Check your dashboard.
upload.processingFailed: Couldn't process this file. It may be scanned, corrupted, or too complex. Try another file.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

settings.title: Settings
settings.privacyInfo: Your data is stored securely in Supabase. We don't share your data with third parties.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all your notebooks, notes, and messages as JSON
settings.deleteAllNotebooksDesc: Remove all notebooks and uploaded data
settings.deleteAllNotebooksConfirm: This will permanently delete all your notebooks, data, and chat history. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your account and all data.
settings.deleteAllFailed: Failed to delete notebooks. Please try again.
settings.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
settings.exportFailed: Failed to export data. Please try again.
